title: The Danubian World
subtitle: Bohemia and Austria: alchemy at the Habsburg courts

narrative.intro: Rudolfine Prague and the Austrian lands: the most concentrated court patronage of alchemy in Europe, with its own economy of favour, imprisonment, and spectacle.
narrative.provenance_note: Regions = 'Bohemia' (37 events) + 'Austria' (25). Events from the ALCHEMYTIMELINEMAP corpus (largely draft-status); locations are event geocodes, not residences. Absence on this map reflects gaps in the record.
narrative.design_note: Alchemical Noir: Rudolfine Prague after dark — court spectacle, favour and imprisonment, gold arcs on black.
